name: Frosted Ginger Cookies - Part 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugars in a mixing bowl.
2. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in molasses and vanilla; mix well.
4. Combine dry ingredients and gradually add to creamed mixture.
5. Drop tablespoonfuls 2 inches apart onto ungreased baking sheets.
6. Bake at 325°F for 12-15 minutes or until cookies spring back when touched lightly (do not overbake).
7. Remove to wire racks.
8. For frosting, bring sugars and butter to a boil in a medium saucepan; boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
9. Stir in milk; bring to a boil again.
10. Remove from heat (mixture will look curdled at first) and cool for 3 minutes.
11. Add vanilla and salt; mix well.
12. Frost warm cookies.
Yield: about 6 dozen
